LAW AND MOTION 302, THE JURISDICTIONAL DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE AND DISMISS FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 14, 2017, TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO TAKE JURISDICTIONAL DISCOVERY. PLAINTIFF MAY PROPOUND ANY OR ALL OF THE JURISDICTIONAL DISCOVERY IT IDENTIFIED IN ITS SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION MEMORANDUM, INCLUDING DISCOVERY DIRECTED TO REVERSE ALTER EGO AND AGENCY THEORIES. CALIFORNIA LAW ON THE PERMISSIBILITY OF THOSE THEORIES IS STILL DEVELOPING AND PLAINTIFF SHOULD NOT AT THIS POINT BE PRECLUDED FROM SEEKING TO IMPOSE JURISDICTION ON DEFENDANTS ON EITHER OR BOTH OF THOSE THEORIES. PLAINTIFF'S SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION PAPERS MUST BE FILED NO LATER THAN AUGUST 25, 2017. SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY PAPERS MUST BE FILED NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 6, 2017. THERE WILL BE NO INVESTIGATIVE DISCOVERY ABSENT FROM AN ORDER FROM THIS COURT. THERE WILL BE NO DEPOSITION DISCOVERY OF SOUTH PARK MALL. THE COURT IS NOT RULING OUT FINANCIAL DISCOVERY AS FAR AS CONTRACT CONCERNING CROWN BUILDING MAINTENANCE COMPANY. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS REMINDED THAT THE LOCAL RULES REQUIRE THAT COURTESY COPIES OF ALL FILED PAPERS BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 302. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: IRENE TOFFT, CSR # 12313 =302/HK

RULING - A R G U E D; The Jurisdictional Defendants' motion to quash service and dismiss for lack of personal jurisdiction is continued to September 14, 2017, to give plaintiff the opportunity to take jurisdictional discovery. Plaintiff may propound any or all of the jurisdictional discovery it identified in its supplemental opposition memorandum, including discovery directed to reverse alter ego and agency theories. California law on the permissibility of those theories is still developing and plaintiff should not at this point be precluded from seeking to impose jurisdiction on defendants on either or both of those theories. Plaintiff's supplemental opposition papers must be filed no later than August 25, 2017. Supplemental reply papers must be filed no later than September 6, 2017. There will be no investigative discovery absent from an order from this court. There will be no deposition discovery of South Park Mall. The court is not ruling out financial discovery as far as contract concerning Crown Building Maintenance Company. Counsel for plaintiff is reminded that the Local Rules require that courtesy copies of all filed papers be delivered to department 302.
